description: A white Toyota Yaris is parked on asphalt, angled slightly towards the viewer's left. The car's front passenger side is prominently displayed. In the background, a multi-story building with balconies adorned with potted plants and a sign that reads 'SANTANA' is visible. The building has large glass windows on the ground floor and a light-colored facade. A red car is parked behind the white Toyota, and a dark-colored car is parked to the right of the white car. The ground is paved with asphalt and concrete curbs, with sunlight casting distinct shadows, indicating a bright, sunny day. The license plate of the white car is partially visible, showing 'Z-064' and a Maltese domain 'toyota.com.mt'. A metal pole stands in the foreground to the right.
location_context: This image appears to be taken in a parking area in front of a hotel or a similar establishment, likely in Malta, given the license plate details.
time_context: Mid-afternoon, indicated by the angle and intensity of the sunlight and the shadows cast.
